source_artifact_id.description: Preferred PopiArt artifact ID for the source image.

image_url.description: Fallback stable image URL when no source_artifact_id exists.

last_frame_image_url.description: Optional final-frame image URL or data URL for start-end video generation.

last_frame_artifact_id.description: Optional PopiArt artifact ID for the final frame when the runtime can resolve artifacts.

images.description: Gateway-compatible image list. For start-end video, images[0] is the first frame and images[1] is the final frame.

metadata.description: Optional gateway metadata. For start-end video, metadata.action defaults to firstTailGenerate when omitted.

prompt.description: Short motion direction or scene behavior.

negative_prompt.description: Optional exclusions or unwanted motion behaviors.

size.description: Optional resolution or exact size such as 720p, 1080P, or 1280x720.

aspect_ratio.description: Portable framing hint such as 16:9 or 9:16.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
